methods.method_name: LS Application and Pollen Tube Growth Assessment
methods.description: This method involves applying liquid LS to apple trees and assessing pollen tube growth to study the effects of different LS application frequencies and concentrations on pollen tube development and fruit set.

steps.description: Select and block apple trees into replications for treatment.
steps.searchable_summary: block apple trees into replications for treatment

steps.description: Apply LS at specified intervals and concentrations using a sprayer.
steps.searchable_summary: apply LS using a sprayer at specified intervals and concentrations

steps.description: Tag flowers at the late-balloon stage and remove them after a set period for pollen tube growth assessment.
steps.searchable_summary: tag and remove flowers for pollen tube growth assessment

steps.description: Count pollen tubes using a specific staining and microscopy method.
steps.searchable_summary: count pollen tubes using staining and microscopy

steps.description: Measure leaf gas exchange using a portable system under specific light conditions.
steps.searchable_summary: measure leaf gas exchange under specific light conditions

steps.description: Determine treatment effects on fruit set from flower and fruit counts.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze treatment effects on fruit set from counts

methods.description: Statistical procedures used to analyze the effects of LS applications on pollen tube number and fruit set, including regression and factorial design analysis.

steps.description: Use GLM procedure to test for treatment effects on pollen tube number and fruit set.
steps.searchable_summary: perform GLM analysis for treatment effects

steps.description: Calculate and analyze the percent of flowers with limiting pollen tube numbers after transformation.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze percent of flowers with limiting pollen tube numbers

steps.description: Use regression procedures to model the effect of LS applications on fruit set and pollen tube numbers.
steps.searchable_summary: model effects of LS applications using regression

steps.description: Analyze Experiment 2 as a 2 × 2 factorial design and present main effect means.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze factorial design and present main effects

steps.description: Analyze Pn data using GenStat software for treatment effects.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze Pn data using GenStat for treatment effects
